options.name: -emptyRow
options.description: Empty row(s) will be deleted before/after specified instance based on the group justifyBy constraint

options.name: -keepCellPlacement
options.description: Keep cell placement when deleting sdp object

options.name: -numRow
options.description: number of row to be deleted

options.name: -object
options.description: Name of sdp object to be deleted

options.name: -obstruct
options.description: Name of sdp group obstruction to be deleted
